themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in public services and aid. This theme is prominently featured in Spain, Italy, France, and the UK, with parties like Vox, Lega, Rassemblement National, and Reform UK advocating for these measures in regional and national governance.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox applies 'national priority' in aid distribution in Valencia and Andalusia, emphasizing local citizens' needs over immigrants.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia push for policies favoring Italian citizens in public housing and social services, often clashing with cultural oversight bodies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN emphasizes national priority in debates over taxation and public services, with leaders like Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella advocating for French citizens' interests.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK campaigns on prioritizing British citizens in public services, criticizing open immigration policies and pushing for stricter controls.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox (Andalusia)
countries.note: Vox's Andalusian campaign centers on 'national priority,' opposing open-door policies and advocating for fiscal restraint.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's domestic and foreign policies continue to shape right-wing narratives worldwide, with his administration's actions on Iran, immigration, and economic measures drawing both praise and criticism. Coverage spans the USA, UK, Spain, Italy, and France, reflecting his influence on global right-wing discourse.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on Iran, immigration, and economic deregulation are central to right-wing media narratives, with ongoing debates over his administration's strategies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK aligns with Trump's immigration policies, advocating for stricter controls and criticizing the UK government's handling of small boat crossings.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox echoes Trump's rhetoric on immigration and national sovereignty, often referencing his policies as a model for Spain.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties reference Trump's foreign policy, particularly his stance on Iran and immigration, as a benchmark for their own positions.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN leaders frequently cite Trump's policies on immigration and economic nationalism, aligning their rhetoric with his administration's approach.

themes.title: Hungary’s political shift under new leadership
themes.blurb: Hungary's recent election marked a historic shift as Viktor Orbán's Fidesz party was ousted by Péter Magyar's Tisza Party. This transition has sparked debates over governance, EU relations, and the future of Hungary's political landscape, with coverage extending to Poland, Germany, and the USA.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: The Tisza Party's victory and Magyar's plans to dismantle Orbán's legacy dominate Hungarian political discourse, with debates over EU funds and governance reforms.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media analyze Hungary's political shift, drawing parallels with PiS's own challenges and internal divisions.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD monitors Hungary's transition, using it to critique EU influence and advocate for nationalist policies in Germany.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump-aligned media highlight Hungary's shift as a potential model for conservative governance, emphasizing sovereignty and anti-corruption efforts.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric continues to be linked to political violence, with incidents reported in Italy, the UK, the USA, and Spain. This theme explores how inflammatory language and policies from far-right parties contribute to societal tensions and violent acts.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia face criticism for rhetoric that allegedly incites violence, particularly against immigrants and political opponents.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's rhetoric on immigration and national identity is scrutinized for potentially fueling tensions and violence in local communities.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric is linked to political violence, with incidents like assassination attempts and protests turning violent.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's inflammatory language on immigration and national identity sparks debates over its role in fostering political violence.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are experiencing a surge in popularity, with polls showing significant gains for parties like AfD in Germany, RN in France, SD in Sweden, Reform UK in the UK, and FrP in Norway. This trend reflects growing voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties and immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads in polls in Saxony-Anhalt and Berlin, capitalizing on voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties and immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN continues to dominate French polls, with Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella positioning the party for the 2027 presidential election.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD's influence grows in Sweden, with the party breaking parliamentary norms and pushing stricter immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK gains traction in UK polls, targeting Labour strongholds and advocating for stricter immigration controls.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP leads in Norwegian polls, focusing on tax cuts and immigration reform as key campaign issues.
